HomePage.title: Welcome to our Website!
HomePage.description: This is an example of a multi-language application using next-intl.

SurahPage.not-found-description: We couldn't find a Surah with the specified ID.
SurahPage.error: An error occurred while loading data. Please try again.
SurahPage.marked-saved: Marked has been saved for this page

Reciters.title: Featured Reciters
Reciters.description: Listen to beautiful Quran recitations from renowned reciters around the world. Each voice carries the divine message with unique beauty and spiritual depth.
Reciters.input: Search reciters by name or style
Reciters.no-reciters-description: We couldn't find any reciters matching your search.Try adjusting your search terms or browse all available reciters.
Reciters.error-loading-title: An error occurred while loading data.

ReciterPage.no-surahs-description: We couldn't find any surahs matching your search.Try adjusting your search terms or browse all available surahs.

Surahs.description: Browse all 114 Surahs of the Holy Quran
Surahs.no-surahs-description: We couldn't find any surahs matching your search.Try adjusting your search terms or browse all available surahs.

VerseAction.no-play: This verse has no audio. Use the play button at the top.
VerseAction.copy-message: Verse has been copied to clipboard

RadiosPage.title: Radio Stations
RadiosPage.no-stations-description: We couldn't find any stations matching your search.Try adjusting your search terms or browse all available stations.

AudioPlayer.audio-player-error: Unfortunately, we were unable to play the audio clip. Please try another reader.

RadioPlayer.radio-player-error: Unfortunately, we were unable to play the audio clip. Please try another station.

Loading.error: An error occurred while loading data. Please try again.

QuickAccessNavigation.dialogDescription: Quickly navigate to a specific Surah and Ayah.

SignIn.title: Welcome Back
SignIn.subtitle: Sign in to sync your favorites, settings and continue your Quran journey
SignIn.terms: By signing in, you agree to our terms of service

AuthError.title: Access Denied
AuthError.access-denied-description: We're sorry, but registration is currently closed. The maximum number of users has been reached.
AuthError.default-description: An error occurred during authentication. Please try again later.

Khatma.title: Khatma Planner
Khatma.description: Plan and track your Quran completion journey. Set daily reading goals and stay motivated.
Khatma.createPlanDescription: Start your journey to complete the Holy Quran. Set your daily goal and we'll calculate the rest.
Khatma.pagesPerDayHelp: Based on this number, we'll calculate your expected Khatma completion date.
Khatma.notesPlaceholder: Add any notes or reminders for this plan...
Khatma.createError: Failed to create plan. Please try again.
Khatma.existingPlanError: You already have an active Khatma plan. Please complete or delete it before creating a new one.
Khatma.updateError: Failed to update. Please try again.
Khatma.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this plan? This action cannot be undone.
Khatma.deleteError: Failed to delete plan. Please try again.
Khatma.noPlansDescription: Start your journey to complete the Holy Quran by creating your first plan.

KhatmaValidation.invalidChars: HTML tags or special characters are not allowed
KhatmaValidation.minPages: Must read at least 1 page daily
KhatmaValidation.notesLong: Notes must be less than 200 characters
KhatmaValidation.pagesPerDayInvalid: Invalid pages per day. Must be between 1 and 604.

KhatmaReader.title: Khatma Reading
KhatmaReader.noActiveKhatma: No active Khatma plan. Please create a plan to start reading.
KhatmaReader.pageLoadError: Failed to load page data. Please try again.
KhatmaReader.tryRefreshing: Try refreshing the page or check your internet connection.

KhatmaFinish.title: Khatma Completion
KhatmaFinish.subtitle: May Allah accept this Khatma and reward you abundantly

Pwa.title: Keep Sakinah Streams one tap away
Pwa.description: Install the app for a faster, more immersive Quran listening experience with offline-friendly access.
Pwa.iosDescription: Tap the Share button in Safari, then choose Add to Home Screen.

Offline.title: You are offline, and this page is not cached yet.
Offline.description: Sakinah Streams can still open pages you visited before, but this one needs an internet connection at least once before it becomes available offline.
Offline.statusOnline: Connection restored. You can try again now.
Offline.tipsTitle: What you can do right now
tips: Return to the home page and open previously visited recitations or surahs.
Reconnect briefly so this page can be downloaded and saved for offline use.
Keep audio or surah pages open once online so they stay available later.

ProfilePage.metaDescription: Manage your Quran and Khatma reminder preferences, connected devices, and profile details.
ProfilePage.title: Your profile
ProfilePage.description: Keep your reading rhythm gentle and consistent. Set one custom Quran reminder and one daily Khatma reminder in a calm, distraction-free space.

profile.title: Profile info
profile.description: A quick snapshot of your account and notification setup.

permission.title: Notification access
permission.enabledToast: Notifications are ready on this device.
permission.defaultDescription: Your reminders are saved, but you still need to allow browser notifications on this device.
permission.deniedDescription: Notifications are blocked in the browser. Turn them back on in your browser settings to receive reminders.
permission.connectedCount: {count, plural, =0 {No connected devices yet} =1 {1 connected device} other {# connected devices}}

status.granted: Notifications are enabled for this device.
status.denied: Notifications are currently blocked for this device.

quranReminder.title: Quran reminder
quranReminder.description: Build a small set of Surah reminders that match your week and keep your reading rhythm gentle.
quranReminder.enabledHint: We’ll send your selected Surah reminder on the days you picked.
quranReminder.disabledHint: Your selections stay saved, but this reminder will stay paused.
quranReminder.activeCount: {count, plural, =0 {No active reminders} =1 {1 active reminder} other {# active reminders}}
quranReminder.editorDescription: Pick a Surah, choose the days, set a time, then add it to your reminder list.
quranReminder.limitHint: Up to 5 Surahs can be reminded
quranReminder.limitReached: You can add up to 5 Quran reminders.
quranReminder.duplicateSurah: This Surah is already in your reminder list.
quranReminder.timeRequired: Choose a time before adding this reminder.
quranReminder.daysRequired: Choose at least one day before adding this reminder.
quranReminder.searchPlaceholder: Search by Arabic or English name
quranReminder.previewBody: You’ll receive a Quran reminder for {summary} on the selected days.
quranReminder.remindersDescription: Review each Surah reminder below before saving your changes.
quranReminder.emptyDescription: Add up to 5 Surah reminders and each one will appear here as a quick card.

khatmaReminder.title: Khatma reminder
khatmaReminder.description: A simple daily nudge to continue your Khatma without extra setup.
khatmaReminder.enabledHint: A daily reminder will help you return to your Khatma plan.
khatmaReminder.disabledHint: Your preferred time stays saved until you want it active again.
khatmaReminder.previewBody: You’ll get one reminder every day at {time} to continue your Khatma.

save.title: Save changes
save.description: Store your preferences in Prisma and keep the reminder schedule in sync.
save.success: Your reminder settings have been saved.
save.error: We couldn't save your reminder settings. Please try again.

validation.quranTime: Choose a time for the Quran reminder.
validation.days: Select at least one day for the Quran reminder.
validation.quranLimit: You can save up to 5 Quran reminders.
validation.quranDuplicate: Choose a different Surah for each reminder.
validation.khatmaTime: Choose a time for the Khatma reminder.
validation.timeRounded: Time must be rounded to 15 minutes. It has been adjusted.

Journey.title: Your Qur'an Journey
Journey.subtitle: Track your progress, maintain your consistency, and celebrate your spiritual growth.

heatmap.title: Reading Activity
heatmap.subtitle: Visualize your daily commitment to the Holy Qur'an

achievements.title: Milestones
achievements.subtitle: Celebrating your dedication and spiritual milestones
achievements.firstDayDesc: Your very first day of reading
achievements.khatma1Desc: Complete your first full Quran Khatma

empty.title: Begin Your Journey
empty.subtitle: Your spiritual progress will appear here as you read. Start your recitation today to build your first streak!

NoteEditor.title: Notes
NoteEditor.description: Add your personal reflections, insights, or reminders about this Surah. Your notes will be saved and accessible whenever you explore this Surah in the Quranic Galaxy.
NoteEditor.noNotes: No notes for this Surah yet. Start by adding your first note!
NoteEditor.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this note? This action cannot be undone.
NoteEditor.addSuccess: Your note has been added successfully!
NoteEditor.editSuccess: Your note has been updated successfully!
NoteEditor.deleteSuccess: Your note has been deleted successfully!
NoteEditor.error: An error occurred while saving your note. Please try again.
NoteEditor.deleteError: An error occurred while deleting your note. Please try again.
NoteEditor.addError: An error occurred while adding your note. Please try again.
NoteEditor.editError: An error occurred while updating your note. Please try again.

Header.title: Quranic Galaxy
Header.description: Click on a star to explore its Surah details. Each star represents a Surah of the Quran.

reflection.instruction: Share your heart with the Quran. Type freely or select a mood to receive spiritual guidance.
reflection.textarea_placeholder: I feel overwhelmed with work and need some peace...
reflection.loading_subtitle: Verily, in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest.
reflection.disclaimer: This is spiritual reflection support, not religious rulings.
reflection.delete_confirm_description: Are you sure you want to delete this reflection? This action cannot be undone.
reflection.limit_reached: You've reached today's AI reflection limit 🌿 Please come back tomorrow or explore preset reflections.
reflection.cooldown_active: Please wait a few seconds before generating another reflection ⏳
